query_text: (florivory OR floral herbivory OR flower damage) AND (flower trait OR floral trait OR floral defence OR floral defense) AND (pollinator OR pollination OR visitation)
notes: Core direct-regime route; search title abstract and full text.

query_text: (seed predation OR pre-dispersal seed predation) AND (floral display OR flower size OR floral trait) AND pollination
notes: Retain only studies with site/time and an empirical response.

query_text: (floral scent OR floral fragrance OR nectar reward) AND (florivore OR beetle OR nectar robber OR pollen thief) AND (pollinator OR pollination)
target_signal: shared attraction / antagonist cue or reward
notes: Do not assume scent/reward is a barrier trait; screen for a second flower-protection measure.

query_text: (floral volatile OR floral chemistry) AND (pollinator visitation OR pollen transfer) AND (florivory OR floral herbivory)
notes: Prioritise downloadable tables and manipulations with untreated observations.

query_text: (pollinator visitation OR pollination success) AND (florivory OR flower damage) AND (individual plant OR plant-level) AND floral
notes: Search supplements and repositories for plant identifiers and denominators.

query_text: (pollination AND florivory) AND (supplementary data OR Dryad OR Zenodo OR Figshare)
